title: Why small & medium sized businesses thrive with monday CRM
excerpt: Led by Xebia: Running a small or medium-sized business comes with unique challenges—limited resources, fast-changing markets, and the constant need to deliver exceptional customer experiences. In this webinar, we’ll sho…

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Led by Xebia: Running a small or medium-sized business comes with unique challenges—limited resources, fast-changing markets, and the constant need to deliver exceptional customer experiences. In this webinar, we’ll show you how monday CRM can help SMEs optimize your customer engagement and sales process, enhance collaboration, and ultimately drive sustainable growth.

Whether you’re new to monday.com or use it for other workflows, this session will cover practical tips, real-world use cases, and hands-on demonstrations to illustrate how a centralized CRM can revolutionize your daily operations.
